# Daemon REST API

<!-- Generated by ./agent_collab_dev.sh build; do not edit by hand. -->

API major: `2`. Every response carries `X-Agent-Collab-API: 2`.

All operations except `GET /health` require the per-daemon Bearer token. `/options` responses are runtime-defined, and `/mcp` is JSON-RPC rather than REST, so neither has a fixed response schema here.

| Method | Path | Authentication | Request | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/health` | open | — | HealthModel |
| `POST` | `/options` | Bearer | OptionsRequestModel | runtime object |
| `GET` | `/options` | Bearer | OptionsRequestModel | runtime object |
| `POST` | `/sessions` | Bearer | StartSessionRequestModel | SessionStateModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions` | Bearer | — | SessionListModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions/{session_id}` | Bearer | GetSessionRequestModel | SessionStateModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions/{session_id}/events` | Bearer | ReadEventsRequestModel | EventBatchModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions/{session_id}/events/wait` | Bearer | WaitEventsRequestModel | EventBatchModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions/{session_id}/result` | Bearer | WaitResultRequestModel | SessionResultModel |
| `POST` | `/sessions/{session_id}/messages` | Bearer | PostMessageRequestModel | EventBatchModel |
| `GET` | `/sessions/{session_id}/transcript` | Bearer | TranscriptRequestModel | TranscriptModel |
| `POST` | `/sessions/{session_id}/stop` | Bearer | — | SessionStateModel |
| `POST` | `/sessions/prune` | Bearer | PruneSessionsRequestModel | PruneResultModel |

## Operations

### GET `/health`

Read daemon liveness and API version

- Operation ID: `health_get`
- Authentication: none
- Request model: none
- Response model: `HealthModel`

### POST `/options`

Describe workdir-scoped runtime options

- Operation ID: `options_post`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `OptionsRequestModel`
- Response model: runtime-defined object

### GET `/options`

Describe workdir-scoped runtime options

- Operation ID: `options_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `OptionsRequestModel`
- Response model: runtime-defined object

### POST `/sessions`

Start a collaboration session

- Operation ID: `start_session_post`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `StartSessionRequestModel`
- Response model: `SessionStateModel`

### GET `/sessions`

List daemon sessions

- Operation ID: `list_sessions_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: none
- Response model: `SessionListModel`

### GET `/sessions/{session_id}`

Read one session

- Operation ID: `get_session_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `GetSessionRequestModel`
- Response model: `SessionStateModel`

### GET `/sessions/{session_id}/events`

Read session events from a cursor

- Operation ID: `read_events_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `ReadEventsRequestModel`
- Response model: `EventBatchModel`

### GET `/sessions/{session_id}/events/wait`

Long-poll session events from a cursor

- Operation ID: `wait_events_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `WaitEventsRequestModel`
- Response model: `EventBatchModel`

### GET `/sessions/{session_id}/result`

Long-poll until a session settles and return its result

- Operation ID: `wait_result_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `WaitResultRequestModel`
- Response model: `SessionResultModel`

### POST `/sessions/{session_id}/messages`

Post input to an interactive session

- Operation ID: `post_message_post`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `PostMessageRequestModel`
- Response model: `EventBatchModel`

### GET `/sessions/{session_id}/transcript`

Read a session transcript

- Operation ID: `read_transcript_get`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `TranscriptRequestModel`
- Response model: `TranscriptModel`

### POST `/sessions/{session_id}/stop`

Stop a live session

- Operation ID: `stop_session_post`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: none
- Response model: `SessionStateModel`

### POST `/sessions/prune`

Preview or apply terminal-session retention

- Operation ID: `prune_sessions_post`
- Authentication: Bearer token
- Request model: `PruneSessionsRequestModel`
- Response model: `PruneResultModel`

## Generated artifacts

The machine-readable contract is [openapi.json](openapi.json). Regenerate both files with `./agent_collab_dev.sh build`; verify them without writes using `./agent_collab_dev.sh build --check`.
